{{Quote|Commander, General Fyefee Tiis of the Republic Light Cruiser ''Whipsaw'' would like a word with you.|[[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Roshton]]|<ref name="HoC" />}}
The '''''Whipsaw''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Light cruiser/Legends|Light Cruiser]] that served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Fyefee Tiis]] and participated in the [[Attack on Cartao|Battle of Cartao]], where it disabled a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Lucrehulk-class_battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]].
